Name: Upholstery2u Ltd
Description:
At Upholstery2u, we’ve ripped up the rule book to deliver a high-quality and affordable mobile upholstery service. 

Our expert upholsterers come directly to your doorstep - using our pioneering, high-spec mobile workshops to refresh your space quickly and professionally without disrupting your business. Simply, we’ve got it in the van. 

As an award winning business, that was founded in 2021 by Daniel and Michael Boyle, we combined industry knowledge with focus on people. We pride ourselves on delivering a personalised, human service that prioritises the needs of our clients and team members. We thrive in multiple industries, catering to the diverse needs of businesses nationwide.

What’s more, Upholstery2u is a green option – by bringing well-used equipment and furniture back to life, we prevent thousands of items from going to landfill.

Linktr.ee: https://linktr.ee/upholstery2u.uk

Name: Tertio
Description:
- Jusqu’à 50% d’économie par rapport au prix neuf 
- minimum 40 Kg éq CO2 sauvés par siège
- garantie de 1 à 5 ans

Tertio accompagne les entreprises dans leur démarche RSE et éco responsable en proposant une alternative qui permet de rallonger de plus de 10 ans la durée de vie des sièges de travail. 

Grace à notre offre de reconditionnement 100% réalisé en France et agrée par les plus grands fabricants, nous contribuons à augmenter l’accès à des sièges ergonomiques au plus grand nombre. 

Avec Tertio Recycle:

- Donnez accès à des sièges ergonomiques à plus de collaborateurs et diminuer les TMS (Troubles Musculo squelettiques)
- Contribuez au réemploi et diminuer la pollution grâce à une offre de reconditionnement claire et accessible
- Engagez votre entreprise dans une démarche écologique grâce à un processus de reconditionnement unique en France et donnez une seconde vie à vos sièges de bureaux

Name: Confort Service

Confort Service is a service provider company specialized in the repair of leather, fabric and microfiber lounges and armchairs. With more than 25 years of experience in the field of after-sales service, our expertise is recognized by the largest manufacturers with whom we work in close collaboration. 

Confort Service is also:

- Interventions carried out throughout France and in Corsica 
- A phoning platform based in the Grand Est, available from Monday to Friday to ensure appointments and case tracking
- A planning service at the cutting edge of technology and a first distance expertise
- Repair of your products out of warranty 

Our expertises: 

- Replacement of foams for softening seats and backs 
- Repair of breakdown of the electric relaxation system 
- Structure and base defect 
- Color work on leather (following a hitch, a scratch, etc.) 
- Recovering (pre-sewn covers only) 
- Spare parts replacement 
* non-exhaustive list 

Our key figures: 
- 48 technicians in France
- 50,000 interventions per year

Description: Estofacar é uma empresa do ramo de estofaria automotiva. Localizada na Rua General Euríco Gáspar Dutra, nº397 - Estreito, Florianópolis, Brazil.

Name: Furniture Repair Bank
Description:
Furniture Repair Bank is growing a community of empowered individuals to reduce household waste through repair and redesign to benefit refugees and low-income families and individuals. We rescue broken and worn furniture items from the public and our partners, restore and redesign them with the help of volunteers, and then provide them to recent immigrants and other people in need.

At Furniture Repair Bank, we are reducing the climate impact of furniture waste by promoting the circular economy of repair and redesign. We empower individuals and build a resilient community by teaching repair and refinishing skills to volunteers, talents that are less frequently passed down through the generations in our increasingly disposable economy. Our volunteers and donors learn that worn or broken furniture does not have to be destined for a landfill. Once restored to like-new condition, the items are gifted to community members in need, such as refugees, domestic violence survivors, and people emerging from homeless situations.

Our efforts are only made possible by our volunteers. Through furniture repair or group volunteering, help with deliveries or warehouse coordination, you can make a tangible difference for the environment and in other people’s lives.

We're here to help companies and groups meet their volunteer goals and promote an engaged workforce. We specialize in group volunteer events that require no skill or preparation. Reach out to build your hands-on, team-building experience with impacts that will last beyond your time with us.

Name: NEO
Description:
Allier conscience et confort dans vos espaces de travail !

NEO rénove et réemploie vos équipements pour créer des espaces conviviaux et personnalisés. Pierre, bois, métal… Nous appliquons des revêtements adhésifs au visuel et au toucher réalistes sur votre mobilier pour moderniser votre environnement de travail tout en s'inscrivant dans une démarche écoresponsable.

Des chaises ou des fauteuils vieillissants, abimés ou encore tâchés ? Nous rénovons le tissu et la mousse ! 

NEO vous propose également de la pose de film solaire, confidentialité ou ant-UV. C'est la fin des problématiques de chaleur ou de vis-à-vis dans vos bâtiments !

Et si vous souhaitez renouveler ou acquérir du mobilier, nous avons une large gamme de mobilier d'occasion !

Name: Mark Baker - Antique Furniture Restoration
Description:
Get a unique look for your home with beautiful bespoke furniture by Mark Baker. Based in Hampton, we are ideally located for the South West London area.

Antique furniture can be transformed to give it a modern new twist, or we can provide designs to suit your tastes. For stunning custom furniture, get in touch now.

Name: Antiques & Furniture Restoration, Inc. - Refinishing, Repair & Upholstery since 1991
Description:
Antiques & Furniture Restoration, Inc. was founded in 1991 in New York City. In 1996, we moved our service to Sterling, Virginia. We are a full service antiques and furniture restoration company. Our 3000 square foot shop handles complete repair and refinishing services, specializing in French Polishing, Color Matching, Piece Replacement, Re-gluing, Upholstery and Repair. Antique Furniture and Restoration, Inc. also handles Insurance Claims for fire, smoke and water damage.

The focus of our work is on maintaining and restoring the look and artistic value of our client’s fine furniture, as well as retaining the value and integrity of the antique. To do so we utilize the finest traditions of quality hand craftsmanship available, we do so with all environmentally safe products. We have by far the most experience with environmentally safe and oil based products . Our products are highly durable and can achieve any look and feel from hand rubbed oil to lacquer and French polish finishes.

Every step in the total process-from the stripping to the final finish-is done by hand. Our company, has over twenty years experience in the field of antique refinishing and restoration. The skills the company has acquired have been obtained through hands-on experience under the guidance of Haridi and his staff of various local craftsmen and experts.

The restoration process involves the use of precious woods and products treated in a way as to preserve their antique value. Every step of our refinishing and restoration process is done in such a way as to preserve the original colors and tonalities of the wood. Every effort is made to ensure the warmth of your furniture. Our finishing is done using only the finest products.

Name: Be Seated at AMFREC
Description:
Today, AMFREC is home to the Studio of “Be Seated at AMFREC.”
Up-cycled English & French furniture and events space.

“We offer eclectic range of English and French chairs and stools, carefully up-cycled, marrying time-honoured craftsmanship whilst embracing modern environmental responsibility suited for the 21st century. Cushions are available to enhance both comfort and aesthetic appeal creating a welcoming and harmonious atmosphere.”
- Ann Turner, Amber Mill Furniture Rural Enterprise Centre Proprietor

To arrange a visit, with no obligation, contact Ann on tel: 07770 758383
or email turnerann@amfrec.com - She will be happy organise your visit at a convenient time.

Amfrec is situated in an idyllic location within the heart of the Derbyshire, yet just 10 minutes from J28 on the M1, and inside 30 minutes travel of Nottingham, Derby, Mansfield, Chesterfield and Sheffield. Frequent trains to and from London in just 2.5 hours.

Name: Tapissier SEIGNEUR
Description:
Depuis 1935, Tapissier Seigneur demeure fidèle à son modèle artisanal, dans la création de sièges, de décors de fenêtre et de tentures murales. Steven Renou perpétue le développement de la maison dans la plus pure lignée de l’artisanat traditionnel. Il illustre dans son atelier parisien, la liberté de création, la capacité d’innovation constante et la transmission du savoir-faire d’exception. 

Avec ses tapissiers en siège, couture et  villiers, la maison conçoit et fabrique pour la décoration d'intérieur des espaces privés et publics : résidentiel, yachts, hôtellerie, boutiques, ... Aujourd'hui, les créations de Tapissier Seigneur rayonnent à travers le monde grâce à l’accompagnement de décorateurs renommés. 

Pour son savoir-faire précieux et innovant, Tapissier Seigneur est labellisé Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant (EPV). Le dynamisme porté par son dirigeant engage la maison à aller de l’avant dans le respect de l’environnement en créant des objets durables qui se transmettent dans le temps. La maison est également étroitement impliqué dans la formation au travers des Compagnons du devoir et de La Bonne Graine.

Name: Creative Colors International
Description:
The Ultimate in On-Site Repair, Restoration, Cleaning, Protection & Dyeing of Leather, Vinyl, Plastic & Fabric!

Creative Colors International is recognized as the leader in:
•Leather Repair (leather jacket, leather boots, leather seats, leather furniture)
•Leather Reconditioning
•Leather Cleaning
•Leather Protection
•Leather Restoration
•Leather Coloring
•Vinyl Repair & Restoration
•Fabric Repair & Restoration
•Plastic & Trim Repair & Restoration
•Carpet Repair & Restoration
•Headlight Repair & Restoration
•Upholstery Repair & Restoration

We’ll come to your location to restore or repair your leather, vinyl, fabric and plastic furniture in your car, home or office.


The expert technicians of Creative Colors International can restore your damaged items to like-new condition while providing you with significant cost savings versus replacement; sometimes as much as a 90% savings.  In addition to delivering dramatic results, Creative Colors International offers convenience by performing all repairs on-site at your home, office, restaurant, body shop or car dealership.

Creative Colors International offers the latest advanced equipment, products, and repair processes in the industry.  The certified technicians at CCI can revitalize the interior of your automobile, boat, furniture, plane, or RV, by restoring and enhancing their natural beauty and strength.  These skilled craftsmen meticulously restore and repair leather to eliminate scuffs, scratches, gouges, scrapes, rips, tears and color fading, that occurs over time due to normal wear and tear.  Even water damaged and fire-damaged pieces can often be repaired to like-new condition.

Our business has grown by providing customers with Quality Leather Repairs, Superior Customer Service and Value!! Trust Creative Colors International to care for your automobile, boat, furniture, plane or RV. Our expertise is unsurpassed; our workmanship is guaranteed.

Name: Kışla Döşeme
Description:
1972 yazında İstanbul Yedikule Samatya’da başladı. Babamız Mevlüt Kışla, henüz genç yaşında çırak olarak adım attığı koltuk döşeme mesleğini; sabır, titizlik ve dürüstlükle yıllar boyunca sürdürdü.

İlk büyük adım, babamız Mevlüt Kışla ve amcamız Süleyman Kışla kardeşlerin beraber atılımıyla gerçekleşti. Kardeşler Döşeme adıyla İstanbul Maltepe Altayçeşme Mahallesi’nde açtıkları ilk iş yerinden sonra, bu yolculuk Emek Döşeme, Zirve Döşeme ve son olarak Kışla Döşeme adıyla devam etti.

Çocukluk yıllarımızda atölyenin kokusunu, babamızın el emeğini ve her işin başında titizlikle çalışmasını izleyerek büyüdük. 90’lı yılların o yoğun iş günlerinde, küçük bir çocuğun gözünden bu mesleğe bakarken, aslında hayat boyu sürecek bir yolculuğun parçası olduğumuzu fark etmedik. Bugün geriye dönüp baktığımızda, “baba mesleği” ifadesinin ne kadar büyük bir anlam taşıdığını görüyoruz.

Pendik Esenyalı’da kurduğumuz Kışla Döşeme, aynı anlayışı geleceğe taşımayı görev edindi:

Titiz işçilik

Kaliteli hizmet anlayışı

Dürüstlük politikası


Bizim için sadece mobilyaları yenilemek değil, insanların evlerinde yıllarca eşlik edecek anılara yeniden hayat vermek çok kıymetli.

Kışla Döşeme, geçmişten gelen ustalıkla bugün modern çözümleri buluşturuyor. Bugün hâlâ her işimizde babamızdan öğrendiğimiz ilkeyle hareket ediyoruz:
“Ne yapıyorsan, en iyisini yap.”

Name: PAOLO NESI SRL
Description: Art and Innovation for unique luxury furnishings. Exclusive Design, environmental sustainability.

Name: Douceur & Crin
Description:
Je suis Nadège Jamoteau, Artisan d'art formé à la tapisserie d'ameublement, ayant créé l'entreprise Douceur & Crin en 2021. 
A travers mon activité, j'ai à cœur de faire perdurer le savoir-faire traditionnel en utilisant le plus possible des matières naturelles et durables. Contribuer au "mieux consommer" fait partie de mes valeurs.
Douceur & Crin est donc un atelier de tapisserie d'ameublement permettant de redonner vie à vos fauteuils, chaises, banquettes.. (qu'ils soient de famille, chinés ou autre), afin de les restaurer, sublimer, et contribuer à leur histoire. Au fil du temps, j'ai d'ailleurs pris pour rituel de déposer une douceur poétique personnalisée dans chaque garniture en crin végétal des sièges restaurés à l'atelier. Comme pour mes clients lors de la découverte de leur siège transformé, l'objectif est d'apporter une émotion particulière au futur tapissier lorsqu'il découvrira ce bout de papier et une partie de l'histoire du siège.
L'atelier Douceur & Crin propose également la confection de rideaux d'ameublement, coussins et têtes de lit sur-mesure, ainsi que la confection d'abat-jours depuis 2023 suite à une formation auprès d'un maître artisan d'art.
L'atelier-boutique est basé à Saint-Didier, à proximité de Châteaubourg, sur l'axe Vitré / Rennes. Les RDV sont organisés à l'atelier après estimation tarifaire préalable sur photos (gratuit). 
Zone d'intervention dans un rayon de 15 kms, sans frais de déplacement.
Je suis à votre disposition pour vous accompagner, conseiller et concrétiser votre projet de rénovation/confection, afin d'obtenir un produit unique et personnalisé, en harmonie avec votre décoration intérieure. 
Je vous laisse découvrir mon travail et mon univers à travers le site internet Douceur & Crin et/ou les réseaux sociaux (Instagram, Facebook...), puis me contacter pour échanger sur votre projet.

Name: Circle Supply
Description: Circle Supply aims to be Europe's leading provider of fabrics and foam products - preferably with a sustainable twist.

Name: Les Chambouleurs • Décapage • Nettoyage • Rénovation •  Location •  Peinture
Description: Décapage par aérogommage et mise en peinture pour la préservation des matériaux! Faire revivre les matières pour consommer mieux. Le ré-emploi et la revalorisation, au coeur de mes valeurs.

Name: Loop Solutions PTY LTD
Description:
For the team at Loop Solutions, circularity and sustainability are more than just buzzwords – they’re the foundation of our business. That's why Circularity, Simplified is our guiding ethos. 

We specialise in simplifying the complex process of auditing, refurbishing and recycling commercial office furniture by connecting previously siloed parts of the industry and bridging the gap between waste and opportunity.

We help businesses not only reduce their environmental footprint but also extend the life of their furniture, giving it a new lease on life and contributing to a circular economy. 

Founded by Peter Appel, a commercial furniture industry expert with decades of experience and a passion for reducing waste and making the industry sustainable, we provide solutions that are practical, impactful and most importantly, easy to integrate into your existing operations.

Our vision is for a future where circularity is second nature for every business – no matter its size.

Name: L'Atelier JSR
Description:
Restauration du patrimoine mobilier & immobilier, notre vision dans notre logo !

L’Atelier JSR, entreprise de menuiserie et de restauration de meubles anciens, adopte une identité visuelle, astucieuse, reflet fidèle de ses valeurs, de son savoir-faire et de sa vision tournée vers l’avenir.



Au cœur de ce logo, la libellule s’impose comme un symbole fort de transformation et de renouveau. 

Elle incarne la métamorphose maîtrisée, celle qui respecte l’histoire tout en insufflant une nouvelle vie aux matières et aux formes. À l’image du travail de L’Atelier JSR, la libellule évoque la légèreté du geste juste, la précision et l’équilibre entre tradition et modernité.



Les rouages intégrés au visuel traduisent la dimension technique du métier. Ils représentent les méthodes éprouvées, la rigueur des procédés et la parfaite coordination des gestes qui permettent d’atteindre un niveau d’exigence élevé. 

Chaque mécanisme illustre la maîtrise des techniques artisanales et la recherche constante de qualité et de durabilité, valeurs fondatrices de L’Atelier JSR.



La roue artisanale des compétences symbolise quant à elle la richesse du savoir-faire de L’Atelier JSR. Elle évoque la transmission, l’expérience et la complémentarité mobilisés à chaque projet. Chaque compétence trouve sa place dans un ensemble cohérent, animé par la passion du travail bien fait et le respect des règles de l’art.



Enfin, l’alliance du bois, matière noble et vivante, avec des couleurs éclatantes marque la volonté de modernisation de L’Atelier JSR. Ce contraste exprime la capacité de l’atelier à sublimer le patrimoine ancien tout en y apportant une touche contemporaine. Il affirme une identité audacieuse, créative et résolument ancrée dans son époque.



Ce logo est l’expression visuelle de l’engagement de L’Atelier JSR : préserver l’authenticité, valoriser la technique et faire évoluer l’artisanat avec sens, exigence et créativité.

Name: Ariel ITALIA
Description: Ariel was born in Naples in the early 1900s '' from the Pierro family, great connoisseurs of the fabric market. Despite the succession of times characterized by ups and downs in the market, the company remains stable and solid. At the beginning of the 2000s the company passed into the hands of Marcella Murolo and Federico Sorice, nephew of the Pierro brothers and radically transformed the company and entered new bussines channels from the market for the supply of upholstery, imitation leather and car fabrics. to the production of mattresses appreciated all over the world, being the only company that customizes the product according to the needs starting from the request of 1 unit up to series production.In a few words we love what we do and see. With over 100 years of industry experience, we know our industry as the palm of our hands. There is no challenge too big or too small and we dedicate our maximum energy to every project we accept.

Name: Mueblea
Description:
Mueblea se especializa en el suministro de mobiliario de oficina y almacenamiento industrial remanufacturado.

Promovemos una cultura de economía circular, ofreciendo soluciones sostenibles que ayudan a tu empresa a reducir el consumo de recursos y minimizar la generación de residuos.

Name: Weserland Sitzsysteme GmbH
Description:
Ein starker Partner für die Industrie!

Die Weserland Sitzsysteme ist ein starker und kompetenter Partner wenn es um die Entwicklung von Sitzen, Sitzsystemen und das Refurbishment von verpolsterten Sitzen im öffentlichen Bereich geht.

Seit 2020 in den Firmenverbund der metz group integriert, ergänzt sie diese
perfekt.

Die metz group vereint Menschen unter einem Dach, welche gerne und in Perfektion Probleme lösen. Wir sind erfahren darin, technische Systeme übergreifend zu denken und immer pfiffige Lösungen zu finden.

Name: Busnelli Tappezzieri
Description:
La Busnelli Tappezzieri snc nasce nel 1978 per iniziativa dei fratelli Ernesto e Gabriele.
In oltre quarant’anni di attività ha saputo mantenere i sistemi di lavorazione ereditati dalla tradizione artigiana, senza tuttavia rinunciare all’utilizzo dei nuovi materiali offerti dal mercato nazionale ed internazionale

Progettiamo e realizziamo tutto quanto concerne l’imbottito, sia per l’interno che per l’esterno.

Realizziamo inoltre rifacimenti arredo per bar, ristoranti e alberghi.

Name: Value Chain Interiors & Furnitures
Description: At Value Chain Interior and Furniture, we’re not just in the business of furniture; we’re in the business of preserving memories, enhancing aesthetics, and ensuring your furniture stands the test of time. With years of expertise in furniture repair and upholstery, we are your trusted partner in reviving the elegance and functionality of your beloved pieces.

Name: EJ Upholstery (Yorkshire)
Description: EJ Upholstery provide high quality upholstery and reupholstery services. From service to staples, our passion for all things upholstery can be seen in our workmanship and attention to detail, where we use the best of both modern and traditional upholstery techniques to create beautiful, upholstered furniture.

Name: Helloilmare
Description:
Helloilmare.com is a pioneer in Indonesia’s furniture restoration and upcycling industry, combining the artistry of local craftsmanship with a SaaS-powered backend. Since 2009, we’ve completed over 6,500 projects across Jakarta, Bandung, Bali, and Bogor. We’re not just restoring furniture; we’re transforming the way Indonesians think about sofa refurbishment. Gone are the days of cumbersome processes and wasteful practices—our platform blends sustainability, efficiency, and unparalleled convenience.

Picture this: you’re sitting on your tired old sofa, dreaming of giving it a new lease on life. But who has the time to hunt down a reliable upholsterer and arrange transport back and forth? That’s where Helloilmare.com comes in. With our simple reservation system, skilled and vetted upholsterers, and location-based matching, you can book a makeover from the comfort of your home—knowing your choice is good for the planet and stress-free for you.

We empower craftsmen as long-term partners, not just service providers, helping them grow their skills, quality, and capacity. Through technology and automation, we make the process transparent, fast, and measurable, ensuring customers get results they love while artisans gain stability and opportunity.

Because every couch is more than wood, fabric, and foam—it’s where families gather, where stories unfold, where milestones are celebrated. At Helloilmare, we believe a sofa worth keeping is a memory worth preserving. And when we restore a piece, we’re not just giving it a new look—we’re giving your memories a new chapter.

Name: La petite Fille de l'Ebéniste
Description:
Revalorisation de meubles issus d'une filière de l'économie circulaire et à destination des particuliers ou des commerces.
Redonne une seconde vie à vos meubles. Relooking sur mesure et accompagnement en décoration d'intérieur.

Name: Foutu Tissu

Name: TFA Paris
Description: Le Textile Français d'Ameublement, showroom professionnel de tissus et tapis d'éditeurs. Nous gérons également des chantiers complets allant jusqu'au mobilier et la pose.

Name: Muebles Para Hogar Spa
Description:
Con más de dos décadas de experiencia, nuestra empresa de retapizado y restauración de sofás en Santiago de Chile se destaca por devolverle vida y elegancia a tus muebles más queridos. Nos especializamos en la reparación de sofá de alta gama, incluyendo marcas reconocidas como Ashley, Natuzzi, Rose, sofá tipo Bergere, entre otras marcas y modelos.

Ofrecemos una amplia selección de más de 200 telas y varios colores para que puedas escoger, permitiéndote personalizar tus muebles según tus gustos y preferencias. Nuestro equipo de artesanos altamente capacitados y apasionados por su trabajo se dedica a cada proyecto con meticulosidad y cuidado, asegurando resultados excepcionales que superen tus expectativas.

En un mundo donde la calidad y la atención al detalle son cada vez más difíciles de encontrar, nos enorgullecemos de mantener los más altos estándares en cada paso del proceso. Desde la selección de los mejores materiales hasta la entrega puntual, cada aspecto de nuestro servicio está diseñado para brindarte una experiencia sin igual.

Nos dirigimos especialmente a un selecto público exigente que valora la calidad, la exclusividad y la atención personalizada. Entendemos que tu hogar es tu refugio y que cada pieza de mobiliario cuenta una historia. Permítenos ser parte de la tuya, devolviendo la belleza y el confort a tus espacios más preciados.

Contáctanos hoy para descubrir cómo podemos transformar tus muebles en verdaderas obras de arte que perduren por generaciones.

Name: Atelier Eldovi
Description: Specialist in meubelstoffering en projectstoffering, nieuw en herstoffering van bootkussens, caravankussens en loungekussens. Altijd maatwerk.

Name: TopForm Furnishing L.L.C
Description: TopForm Furnishing has been in the forefront of furniture reupholstery, curtain making and other interior furnishing services in the U.A.E since 1993. Over the years we have built a long list of satisfied clienteles in the hotel industry, government and corporate sector who patronize us for our quality, reliability and personal attention.

Name: Elmar Upholstery
Description:

Name: Bespoke Vintage Design
Description:
Mid-Century Modern Furniture & Home Decor
seating - lighting - tables - storage - accessories

Telling Timeless Tales

Design classics last forever. Reimagining them adds even more character to fit your contemporary interior. Our collection consists of mid-century American and Scandinavian designs and brands. With a genuine appreciation for the thought and meaning behind each piece, we aim to create a lifelong connection for future generations. 

At Bespoke, the rules don’t apply to traditional re-upholstery. We consider our collection like art for daily use, filled with color, creativity, and personality while respecting its original intent.

Celebrating Craftsmanship

We believe in craftsmanship and act upon this with a strong focus on sustainability, using only high-end fabrics from various premium brands and reusing as much hardware as possible. Every piece is meticulously dissected at our Bespoke atelier to stay true to its original construction. This all caters to giving the furniture a second or even third life for you to enjoy.

Sign up now!
Behind the Seams offers exclusive early access to our latest reimagined vintage pieces before they’re available online. We also love sharing the stories behind these design classics and the significance of their legendary creators.

https://www.bespokevintage.nl/behind-the-seams

Che si tratti di restaurare gli interni di una barca d’epoca o di realizzare una tappezzeria moderna e funzionale, il nostro obiettivo è offrire ai nostri clienti uno spazio che li rappresenti. Affidati a noi per trasformare ogni dettaglio della tua imbarcazione in qualcosa di speciale.

- Proficiency in, French polishing, historic joinery, cabinet work, gilding and more
- Specialized services in stripping, re-finishing, polishing, veneer, repair, carving, and marquetry
- Restoration of water damage, heat damage, scratches, and various structural issues like broken legs and arms
- Skilled in Boulle work, inlay, and handling modern finishes and lacquers

Additionally, we provide:
- Collection and delivery service
- Insurance estimates and detailed condition reports
- Emergency restoration work
- Access to a network of conservation experts for various materials and specialties
- Competitive pricing with maintenance and interior woodwork services available nationwide

We offer competitive prices (approximately 40% less than larger conservation companies). Contact us today to breathe new life into your cherished pieces.
Rick Heritage on Tel: 07715888748 Email: rick.heritage@btinternet.com

RénoDéco est une entreprise spécialisée dans la rénovation et la décoration d’intérieur et d’extérieur, s'inscrivant dans les services modernes de Construction, Aménagement, Ameublement et Rénovation (C.A.A.R). Elle apporte une expertise unique pour transformer, sublimer et moderniser tous types d’infrastructures, de meubles et d’espaces.
Notre mission est d'offrir des solutions sur mesure, adaptées aux besoins des particuliers, des professionnels et des institutions. RénoDéco combine innovation, artisanat local et matériaux de qualité pour garantir des résultats esthétiques et durables.
Nous intervenons sur :

 Décoration sur mesure, du design à la mise en œuvre
 Fabrication et transformation de meubles locaux pour un rendu authentique et raffiné
 Optimisation des espaces, en alliant confort et modernité
Chez RénoDéco, chaque projet est une fusion entre créativité, savoir-faire et excellence pour redonner vie à vos espaces. 
 Transformez votre environnement, sublimez votre quotidien avec RénoDéco.

 Notre Mission
Offrir des solutions de rénovation et de décoration sur mesure, adaptées aux besoins des particuliers, des professionnels et des institutions. Chaque projet est une fusion entre innovation, artisanat local et excellence technique pour créer des espaces fonctionnels, esthétiques et inspirants.
 Nos Valeurs et Engagements

 Professionnalisme : Nos responsables ont acquis une expertise approfondie grâce à des formations et apprentissages dans plusieurs pays, intégrant les meilleures techniques et tendances internationales.
 Qualité et Durabilité : Nous sélectionnons des matériaux nobles et respectueux de l’environnement pour garantir des réalisations durables.

Name: OneOff
Description:
At OneOff, we believe true luxury lies in what lasts.

We restore and reimagine high-end furniture through a modern, sustainable approach, combining craftsmanship, technology, and transparency.

Our work is built around three complementary avenues:

 OneOff Restoration
A hands-free restoration service for designer sofas. We handle pick-up, reupholstery, foam renewal, and delivery. All through our network of certified U.S. artisans. Your piece returns looking and feeling like new, with materials chosen to last.

 OneOff Care
Professional cleaning, protection, and maintenance services for upholstery. Think of it as “AppleCare for your sofa”, preserving comfort and extending the lifespan of fine design through safe, performance-grade treatments.

 OneOff Vault
A curated marketplace of restored designer sofas sourced from brand inventories or private collections. Each piece is fully refurbished and upholstered in the fabric or leather of your choice, combining sustainability, customization, and exceptional value.

Whether you’re a homeowner, interior designer, real estate developer, or furniture brand, OneOff offers a smarter, circular alternative to replacement giving fine design a second life.

 Made local. Restored to last.

Name: Empire Upholstery

We’re a small, Perth upholstery repair team, and so we understand the importance of maintaining our outstanding reputation in the local community. We pride ourselves on our craft and we are dedicated to always providing our customers with the best level of service from start to finish. It’s this level of dedication and our exceptional value for money, which has lead to countless of satisfied customers.

Tambien operamos una sucursal en Estados Unidos llamada Western Camarena, ubicada en la ciudad de San Diego, CA.

Con objeto de suministrar oportunamente y mantener la calidad internacional de los productos demandados por sus clientes, don Salvador Camarena fundo empresas fabricantes de aquellos artículos importantes y difíciles de conseguir. Tales como alfombras, viniles y hule espuma.

So when you shop with us, you can rest assured knowing that you’re doing your part to help the environment!

Name: Repair Restore Renew LLC
Description: Each year, Americans throw out more than 12 million tons of furniture and furnishings and only a small percentage is recycled. As a result, over 9 million tons of wood, metal, glass, fabric, leather, and foam waste ends up in a landfill. Repair Restore Renew started in 2012 to help people keep their heirloom and antique furniture looking and functioning as new. Today we repair all types of furniture & cabinets and work with clients to customize their existing furniture giving them a one-of-a-kind look for their home. By keeping our community’s furniture repaired and updated, we can keep things from ever needing to be recycled or worse, sent off to the landfill.

Name: Solace Studio NYC
Description:
At it's core, Solace studio is a personification of all my obsessive childhood interests; history, handiwork and an ever-enduring desire to preserve rather than merely consume.  Solace was founded on these principles, and this love and appreciation for craftsmanship is reflected in our work.


At Solace Studio, we are more than just a furniture restoration company – we are custodians of history and champions of sustainability. With a deep-rooted passion for artistry, we breathe new life into antique, vintage, and cherished furniture pieces, honoring their rich heritage while embracing a greener future. Our small staff of skilled artisans meticulously restore each piece, weaving a story of time-honored techniques and modern eco-conscious practices. Solace Studio is where the past meets the present, and where furniture's journey transcends eras, leaving a legacy of beauty, history, and respect for our planet.

Name: Huis van ien
Description:
𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐬 𝐤𝐨𝐦𝐭 𝐞𝐫 𝐢𝐞𝐭𝐬 𝐨𝐩 𝐣𝐞 𝐩𝐚𝐝 𝐰𝐚𝐚𝐫 𝐣𝐞 𝐠𝐞𝐞𝐧 𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐚𝐚𝐧 𝐤𝐮𝐧𝐭 𝐛𝐢𝐞𝐝𝐞𝐧 𝐞𝐧 𝐠𝐨𝐨𝐢 𝐣𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐭 𝐫𝐨𝐞𝐫 𝐨𝐦!
Ik heb me mijn leven lang bewogen in het artistieke dansveld. Na een carrière als professionele danseres, werd ik in 1995 co-founder van de Henny Jurriëns Studio in Amsterdam. Dit is een open studio voor professionele dansers. Als hoofdprogrammeur kon ik de beste dansdocenten en choreografen uit de wereld naar de dansstudio halen, om lessen en workshops te geven aan de professionele (inter) nationale dance community in Amsterdam. 

Daarnaast had ik altijd al een liefde voor mooie stoffen en hout, en op een dag belandde ik op het Hout- en Meubileringscollege in Amsterdam en voedde mijn passie tot ik er niet meer omheen kon. 
Na mijn diploma van het Hout- en Meubileringscollege gehaald te hebben, opende ik in 2022 mijn meubelstoffeerderij Huis van ien, en in 2023 trok ik de stoute schoenen aan en besloot ik al mijn tijd aan mijn eigen bedrijf te wijden. Duurzaamheid is een belangrijke factor en ik draag zoveel als mogelijk mijn steentje bij door het kiezen van duurzame materialen – en stoffen. 

𝐈𝐤 𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐩 𝐣𝐞 𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐚𝐠.
Heb je een meubel staan, waarvan je geen afscheid kunt nemen en waar je te zeer aan gehecht bent?  Vertel me je verhaal erachter en ik ga je helpen om je bestaande familie- , geliefde- , design-, op de kop getikte- (vintage) meubelstuk in het nieuw te steken, zodat die weer een extra ronde mee kan gaan.

𝐅𝐚𝐬𝐭 𝐅𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐞𝐭𝐬 𝐰𝐚𝐭 𝐰𝐞 𝐧𝐢𝐞𝐭 𝐦𝐞𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧, 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐟𝐟𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐧 𝐢𝐬 𝐡𝐞𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐰𝐨𝐨𝐫𝐝!
Laat me weten wanneer je vragen hebt, via Linkedin , telefoon of email. 

zie bij uitgelicht voor meer info

Name: Woodqvist by Sundqvist Agency
Description:
Second hand furniture is an ecological choice. When used furniture is given new life by creative flipping, it saves a lot of natural resources and reduces waste. Circular economy is good for the environment.

Woodqvist upcycles used furniture for a new round of use. The furniture that have been acquired from different sources, such as thrift stores, flea markets and donations, are cleaned, upcycled, repurposed, repaired, modernized, painted or otherwise finished and in one word flipped for a new round.

The flipped furniture is a unique, individual and ecological choice. You cannot find it in other stores, at least it’s not exactly the same. 

There’s nothing wrong with IKEA, I have many Billy bookcases at home and they’re very convenient and affordable. But they are not into everyone's style. A stylish home interior has a different kind of air and feel into it. 

While the selection of Woodqvist has some recent furniture from the 90’s as well, most of the furniture are more vintage with history & heritage. Some are restored and some are have been treated more creatively by modernizing and adding character.

Currently the furniture are available at Woodqvist webshop at www.woodqvist.fi and they are to be picked up at the workshop in Kotka, Finland. I am unable to deliver even short distances at the moment, and am quite reluctant to ship, I’m sorry. Shipping would amount to a significant shipping fee but can be arranged for a cost. Shipping and delivery terms will change for the better some time in 2025.

For more detailed look into Woodqvist, please see my Instagram account @woodqvist

Name: reGarde - Mobilier Pro Réinventé
Description:
reGarde valorise par le réemploi le mobilier issu des établissements touristiques des Alpes du nord (Savoie et Haute Savoie), évacué lors des opérations de réaménagement. Nous transformons ce mobilier, en partenariat avec les structures locales de l'économie sociale et solidaire, pour vous proposer une offre qualitative et sur mesure de mobilier professionnel en réemploi.
Une activité qui démarre en 2025, notre gamme de produits évoluera avec les opportunités de mobilier à récupérer des établissements touristiques. Chaque série de mobilier est donc limitée par la quantité disponible dans l'établissement. Nous ne le transformons que sur commande. 
Si vous êtes un acteur public tenu par les obligations de la Commande Publique ou un professionnel soucieux de votre impact social et environnemental, contactez-nous pour échanger sur vos besoins de mobilier !
Si vous êtes un établissement touristique en Savoie ou Haute Savoie, contactez-nous pour donner une nouvelle vie à votre ancien mobilier !

Colour Code Wraps Ltd now have a wealth of experience in both commercial and residential projects. We look to make a difference helping larger organisations carbon footprints but also benefit from the economical advantages over traditional renovation projects.

Si vous souhaitez faire réparer, faire restaurer ou avoir un objet/meuble de seconde main unique - « relooké » par mes soins selon vos envies et vos goûts, votre univers, les nouvelles tendances, VOTRE nouvelle tendance mais également mes idées si vous n'en avez pas, n'hésitez pas à me contacter!

Principaux secteurs d'activité :
autour de Provins, Nangis, Bray-sur-Seine, Montereau-Fault-Yonne (77) ;
autour de Nogent-sur-Seine (10) ;
autour de Sens (89).

Pour tout autre secteur, n'hésitez pas à me contacter, j'étudierai la faisabilité du projet.  :-)

Par ailleurs, je fais partie de l'annuaire « Répar'Acteurs » mis en place par l'ADEME et le réseau de la Chambre des Métiers et de l'Artisanat.  :-)
Ce dispositif  valorise le recyclage des objets par leur réparation auprès d'artisans qualifiés et répertoriés géographiquement.

Name: Found in Sweden
Description:
About the shop
Found in Sweden does exactly what it says on the tin. Everything you find in this shop is hunted and gathered in Sweden. Located on the beautiful Javaplein, in Amsterdam East, the shop offers everything from mid-century sideboards and other larger pieces of furniture, to smaller items such as lamps, candleholders and table cloths. The shop is constantly shifting and changing, with new items weekly, either fresh from Sweden, or fresh out of the workshop. Many, although not all the pieces are restored back to their former glory, or refreshed with new colour or new fabric.

It’s a shop that doesn’t take itself too seriously, so whilst some pieces are designer classics with a somewhat bigger price tag, there’s also plenty of affordable goodness from the previous century. You’ll find items that are beautiful and pristine, but also items that are a little silly or rough around the edge. Sometimes the shop is clean and neat, sometimes chaotic. Some pieces make it online, others don’t. You get the gist. In the world of vintage, you never know what you might find, and that is Found in Sweden in a nutshell. Come by for a browse, a chat, or a purchase. Up to you :)

Tout est ressource n’est-ce pas ? Un meuble, un objet peuvent être restaurés, transformés, réutilisés. Porteurs de cicatrices, symbole de leur vécu, ils errent dans les vide-greniers, la déchetterie du coin ou au fonds d’un garage, abandonnés à qui veut bien leur donner encore une chance.
Tous les meubles et objets que vous trouverez sur mon site m’ont interpellée.  Ils s'appellent Léon, Augustin, Eulalie ou encore Eugénie et bien d’autres encore suivront. Un prénom ancien, car ils le sont, mais toujours d’actualité !

Alors participez à l’écriture de leur nouvelle page d’histoire chez vous, dans votre quotidien parce qu’ils en valent encore le détour…

Name: Nimble Norfolk
Description:
Nimble Norfolk was established in 2021. My passion for history and crafts combined to inspire me to set up a business to keep this lovely style of furniture alive. All repairs are completed with meticulous attention to detail, resulting in a product that is as good as new.
I specialise in furniture caning, breathing new life into loved but worn and fragile items. I work with traditional hole-to-hole caning and with pressed cane panels. Please get in touch to discuss your needs.
I have trained in appropriate, sympathetic and reversible repair and restoration techniques for wooden furniture. If you would like me to, I will design a care plan for your piece - for example, how I could address weak joints, or how I might restore the surface finishes of your furniture if desired.
While respecting and preserving the traditional methods of weaving, I would love to explore ways of bringing the technique up to date. Collaborating with an upholsterer for creative cushions, artists to transform brown furniture into something funky and bright, or weaving coloured threads among the cane patterns are all exciting routes to trial and discuss.

Name: Upcycled Rabun
Description:
Upcycled Rabun is a full-service furniture restoration company nestled among the Appalachian mountains in Lakemont, Georgia where inspiration emerges just outside our doorstep.

From woodland browns and rhododendron greens, golden, flame azaleas, brilliant magnolia blossoms, smoky granite outcroppings, to the majesty of blue ridge sunsets  - Appalachia home to rich colors and textures. 

For centuries, Appalachia was isolated from the growing manufacturing centers across the southeast - including Atlanta - so our ancestors were self-sufficient craftspeople who often crafted the furniture that made a log cabin a home. Many of those heirloom items collect mold and dust in the barns, attics, and basements across the hills and hollers of our communities. 

As our communities opened up to the world, 20th century manufactured furniture began to adorn the homes of working families who had more disposable income than previous generations. Their Depression-era furniture and mid-century modern (MCM) styles are among our favorite finds at the thrift stores and flea markets in our area. 

In recent history, the cabins and lake houses across north Georgia and Western North Carolina have brought wealthier residents to Appalachia who are looking for more high-end furniture and home goods. 

No matter the budget, style, or the size of the project, Upcycled Rabun is here to bring the spirit of the outdoors into your home with wild and elegant furniture and home goods that gives attention to the timeless, heirloom craftsmanship of our Appalachian ancestors.

Description:
The Upholstery Depot LLC was established in 2014, we provide the highest level of customer service by understanding the needs of each individual customer. We offer competitive pricing and on-time scheduling, developing solutions to difficult problems with expert craftsmanship.

Name: Cofransel
Description:
Rénovateurs de sièges depuis 1979 : une expertise au service de vos espaces

Depuis plus de 50 ans, nous redonnons vie aux sièges et fauteuils des amphithéâtres, auditoriums, théâtres, cinémas, salles de spectacles, halls d’accueil, et bien plus encore. Notre mission? Allier durabilité, économie et personnalisation pour répondre aux besoins de nos clients.

Nous intervenons sur l’ensemble du siège :
  Revêtements (tissu, cuir, simili)
  Mousse et confort
  Éléments mécaniques (ressorts, etc.)
  Structure (bois, aluminium, PVC)

Chaque projet est unique: nous rénovons à l’identique ou selon vos envies (nouvelles couleurs, matières, designs).

Étapes de la rénovation des sièges de salle de spectacle :
 1 Conception d’un prototype pour votre validation
 2 Fabrication des housses et mousse dans notre atelier, et contrôle qualité rigoureux 
 3 Rehoussage et réparation des éléments mécaniques dans votre salle (ou dans notre atelier avec démontage et remontage des fauteuils si vous souhaitez rénover le sol)
 4 Nettoyage intégral de la salle après travaux

La durée des différentes étapes est identique à celle de la fabrication de fauteuils neufs. 

Pourquoi nous choisir :
  Économique : jusqu’à 30% moins cher que des sièges neufs
  Écologique : 35kg de déchets évités par siège grâce à la conservation des structures
  Sécurisé : conformité aux normes anti-feu AM18 pour les ERP

Nos références : Le Grand Amphithéâtre de la Sorbonne, Ecole Polytechnique, Conservatoire de Montreuil, Hermès, et bien d’autres!

 Certifications : ISO 9001 (Qualité) et ISO 14001 (Développement durable)

Confiez-nous vos sièges et adoptez une démarche durable, esthétique et économique.

  Contactez-nous : contact@cofransel.fr

Vores ekspertise ligger primært i at ompolstre og reparere gamle møbler såsom sofaer, stole og puffer. Men vi stopper ikke der! Vi tilbyder også specialdesignet møbelfremstilling til kunder med specifikke ønsker og behov.  Vi elsker at vejlede vores kunder om design, materialevalg og produktionsteknikker, og ansat har vi en møbelsnedker for at skabe unikke og håndlavede møbler.

Vores erfarne og professionelle team brænder for godt håndværk, og vi gør alt for at imødekomme vores kunders behov og ønsker. Vi tror på, at kvalitet er nøglen til at skabe smukke og holdbare møbler, og derfor anvender vi kun de allerbedste materialer og teknikker. Så kan vores kunder nyde deres møbler i mange år fremover. 

Er du på udkig efter en polstrer med ekspertise, passion og dedikation? Så kontakt os i dag, og lad os hjælpe med at give dine møbler nyt liv!

RFS Sustain is a leading sustainability driven company dedicated to transforming the way organisations manage, reuse, and repurpose their workplace assets. With a strong commitment to environmental responsibility, RFS Sustain helps businesses achieve circular economy goals by extending the lifecycle of office furniture, fixtures, and equipment through innovative reuse, refurbishment, and recycling solutions. The company provides a comprehensive range of services, including sustainable workplace clearances, asset auditing, furniture refurbishment, and charitable redistribution, ensuring that every project delivers both environmental and social value.

By combining decades of industry expertise with cutting-edge technology and a passion for sustainable progress, RFS Sustain supports clients in meeting their ESG targets while reducing waste, carbon emissions, and costs. Their experienced team works closely with organisations to create efficient, ethical, and adaptable workplace strategies that minimise environmental impact and maximise resource value.

Whether managing large scale corporate relocations, implementing net-zero initiatives, or designing greener work environments, RFS Sustain provides tailored, data-driven solutions that align business objectives with sustainability ambitions. With transparency, innovation, and integrity at its core, the company continues to lead the shift toward a more circular and responsible approach to workplace change, proving that sustainability and business success go hand in hand.

Name: Meubelstoffeerderij.nl
Description:
Meubelstoffeerderij.nl is a design upholstery workshop for design classics. Providing upholstery for brands including Cassina, Vitra, Tecno and B&B Italia. 

Meubelstoffeerderij.nl enjoys a reputation for being one of the best upholstery workshops in the Netherlands.


Our story:

In 1995, Dennis van der Burch founded his ‘Upholstery Studio for Design Furniture.’

While working as an employee, he often received comments that his work was “too perfect” and “not something we can charge for.” When he eventually started his own upholstery business, he sought out a clientele that appreciated his approach and craftsmanship.

Anticipating that design furniture would become the new antiques of the future, he fully dedicated himself to restoring modern classics and began creating a collection of templates to ensure the successful replication of previous work.

With the same passion and precision that Dennis started with, we continue to dedicate ourselves to preserving design classics. Our focus is on craftsmanship, sustainability, and breathing new life into iconic designs. Meubelstoffeerderij.nl has grown into a trusted name in the world of design and quality, where tradition and innovation go hand in hand.

We look forward to contributing to the beauty and sustainability of modern design for years to come.

#Restore #Repair #Reupholster

Chaque élément de décor que vous choisissez raconte une histoire, une émotion, ajoutant une profondeur à votre espace.

Name: Meubelstoffeerderij.nl
Description:
Meubelstoffeerderij.nl is a design upholstery workshop for design classics. Providing upholstery for brands including Cassina, Vitra, Tecno and B&B Italia. 

Meubelstoffeerderij.nl enjoys a reputation for being one of the best upholstery workshops in the Netherlands.


Our story:

In 1995, Dennis van der Burch founded his ‘Upholstery Studio for Design Furniture.’

While working as an employee, he often received comments that his work was “too perfect” and “not something we can charge for.” When he eventually started his own upholstery business, he sought out a clientele that appreciated his approach and craftsmanship.

Anticipating that design furniture would become the new antiques of the future, he fully dedicated himself to restoring modern classics and began creating a collection of templates to ensure the successful replication of previous work.

With the same passion and precision that Dennis started with, we continue to dedicate ourselves to preserving design classics. Our focus is on craftsmanship, sustainability, and breathing new life into iconic designs. Meubelstoffeerderij.nl has grown into a trusted name in the world of design and quality, where tradition and innovation go hand in hand.

We look forward to contributing to the beauty and sustainability of modern design for years to come.

#Restore #Repair #Reupholster

Name: reformo
Description:
Vores Historie – En Grøn Vision for Fremtiden
Hos Refurniture startede vores rejse med en simpel, men kraftfuld tanke: Hvorfor smide gode møbler ud, når de kan få nyt liv? I en tid, hvor forbrugskulturen dominerer, og møbler ofte ender som affald, så vi en mulighed for at gøre en forskel – både for virksomheder, samfundet og miljøet.

Hvordan det hele begyndte
Det hele startede med en erkendelse: Alt for mange funktionelle møbler bliver kasseret, blot fordi de ser slidte ud eller ikke længere passer ind i en given stil. Samtidig efterspørger virksomheder og institutioner bæredygtige alternativer, der kan styrke deres grønne regnskab. Vi besluttede os for at tage udfordringen op og skabe en virksomhed, der kombinerer håndværksmæssig ekspertise med en bæredygtig tilgang.

Name: Antiguo & Garbi Sevilla
Description:
𝗔𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗼 𝘆 𝗚𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗶 está conformado por los mejores expertos en restauración de muebles de Sevilla. Nuestro equipo es joven, pero goza de una larga trayectoria en el área de la restauración. Desde el 2006, nos dedicamos a la aplicación de diferentes técnicas de restauración artesanal, barnizados de muebles y su decoración, pátinas y lacados, entre otros servicios. No hay duda que restaurar muebles de madera es nuestra especialidad     

La restauración de muebles antiguos es uno de los servicios que facilitamos en Sevilla. Nuestro procedimiento de restauración de muebles se compone de la utilización de las técnicas más artesanales y consiste en un primer estudio de intervención para diagnosticar el estado de conservación de la pieza a restaurar y así valorar cuáles serán los siguientes pasos a seguir. Limpiar los barnices antiguos y decaparlos de forma manual, tratar las fisuras, grietas y curvaturas de la madera, así como consolidar la pieza con consolidantes de madera, reforzando su estructura con los trabajos de carpintería y ebanistería que se precisen. Proceder a la tintura e igualado de maderas con pigmentos naturales (anilinas), tapar fendas y retapar orificios de salida de la carcoma con cera natural por medio de técnicas tradicionales. Después realizar trabajos de ebanistería o si la pieza lo requiere, marquetería y reposiciones volumétricas y finalmente terminar la pieza dándole el acabado al mueble con cera, barniz o con gomalaca a muñequilla.

𝗠𝗮́𝘀 𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗮𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗿 𝗺𝘂𝗲𝗯𝗹𝗲𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗺𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗮.

Además de la restauración de muebles antiguos, en Antiguo y Garbi contamos con un amplio catálogo de servicios adicionales, como:

• Eliminar carcoma.
• Restauración de imágenes religiosas.
• Pintar muebles.
• Eliminar termitas.

Así, daremos una excelente respuesta a sus demandas si precisa cualquier tipo de colchón, canapé, base tapizada o sofá, aportándole los mejores productos del mercado a precios muy competitivos.

Name: Driftless Claims & Restoration
Description:
Driftless Claims & Restoration specializes in claims servicing for the moving, insurance, hospitality, and furniture industries. Our experienced technicians provide professional onsite and virtual inspection services and expert repairs to furniture, appliances, vehicles, antiques, fixtures, musical instruments, and more.

DCR has recently expanded our Property Damage Repair services and would happily provide you with an inspection and repair quote for any property/home damage that may have occurred during a move. We have relationships with many specialists and artisans and are happy to coordinate any 3rd party repairs - managing the entire process with them to provide superior customer service for any need. 

DCR also specializes in proactive hotel furniture repair services that revitalize your hotel's interior before issues impact the guest experience. Our expert craftsmen can restore all types of furniture to its former glory, repairing scratches and dents, and refinishing surfaces. We provide cost-effective, tailored solutions to help you save on replacement costs, maximize your return on investment (ROI), and preserve your initial investment.

Driftless sets a new standard for claims management and repair services by leveraging the latest technology for precise inspections and reporting. 

Whatever the challenge, we’re here to help you surpass expectations. Contact Driftless Claims & Restoration to see how we can help. Please contact us at Service@DriftlessCR.com or 608-432-5603.
